posts.value_post:
Wedding planning shouldn't feel like a second job.

But here's what most couples do:
- Guest list in a Google Doc
- Budget in a spreadsheet
- Vendor quotes in email threads
- Seating chart on a napkin

Then they wonder why things fall through the cracks.

One workspace. Every detail. Zero chaos.

thread_post: I built a Notion template that turns wedding planning chaos into a calm, organized system. Here's what's inside 🧵👇

Guest List Manager

Track every guest: RSVP status, meal preferences, plus-ones, table assignments, thank-you notes.

Filter by confirmed / pending / declined in one click.

No more "wait, did they RSVP?" texts.

Budget Tracker

Every cost categorized: venue, catering, flowers, photography, attire...

Estimated vs. actual columns so you always know where you stand.

See remaining budget at a glance. No surprises.

Vendor Board + Timeline

Compare vendors side by side: quotes, ratings, availability.

Month-by-month checklist from 12 months out to wedding day.

Always know what to book next and when.

Get it for $17 — works on free Notion. Share with your partner, planner, or wedding party.

Link in bio 💒
